---
title: "Banaras Hindu University"
date: "2024-05-01"
description: "Cloud Computing in Geography (Guest Lecture)."
image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=BHU+Workshop"
categories: [Past]
---

**Cloud Computing in Geography**  
*Guest Lecture | 2024*  

A workshop focusing on migrating traditional GIS workflows to the Google Earth Engine cloud.

[<i class="bi bi-images"></i> Gallery](../gallery.qmd){.social-btn}
